steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: Because triangle QPR is similar to triangle STR, the vertices match in order: Q with S, P with T, and R with R. Therefore segment QP corresponds to ST, and QR corresponds to SR.

steps.title: Build the proportion
steps.content:
Use the corresponding side ratios:
$$\frac{QP}{ST}=\frac{QR}{SR}$$
Substitute the known side lengths:
$$\frac{18}{11}=\frac{30}{SR}$$
